artifacts.summary: Official discovery found university-controlled German guidance for generative AI in examinations, the Senate recommendations PDF, and KIM guidance for the GPTalk internal AI chat service. The bundle uses German official evidence as canonical and records resource-index/news/course items as rejected because they were lower-specificity discovery aids rather than direct policy evidence.

artifacts.claimText: University of Hohenheim guidance says generative AI systems are generally permitted as aids in unsupervised written exams such as term papers, seminar papers, and theses when their use does not conflict with the exam purpose; the examiner or module supervisor decides for the specific assessment.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: When generative AI tools are permitted for written work, University of Hohenheim materials say students submit an AI-use declaration in addition to the usual declaration of originality, with the exact contents determined by the examiner.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: University of Hohenheim guidance warns that third-party data may not be passed into AI systems without consent and says personal, confidential, or otherwise sensitive data generally must not be fed into AI systems.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Hohenheim KIM describes GPTalk as a university-internal AI chat service for university members that provides browser-based access to modern language models, including OpenAI ChatGPT and open-source models, without requiring an external account.

citation.publisher: Kommunikations-, Informations- und Medienzentrum (KIM), Universität Hohenheim
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The GPTalk guide tells students not to use GPTalk as their sole source, to enter no personal data, to remain responsible for the content as authors, and to make AI use transparent; it also says lecturers may not use GPTalk to correct or assess student work.

citation.publisher: Kommunikations-, Informations- und Medienzentrum (KIM), Universität Hohenheim
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Generative KI-Systeme dürfen grundsätzlich als Hilfsmittel bei unbeaufsichtigten schriftlichen Prüfungsleistungen wie Hausarbeiten, Seminararbeiten und Abschlussarbeiten eingesetzt werden, sofern ihr Einsatz nicht dem eigentlichen Zweck der Prüfung entgegensteht. Die Entscheidung darüber liegt im Ermessen der jeweiligen Prüfer oder Modulverantwortlichen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Generative AI systems may generally be used as aids in unsupervised written examinations if their use does not conflict with the examination purpose; the examiner or module supervisor decides.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Empfehlungen zum Umgang mit generativen KI-Systemen im Zusammenhang mit akademischen Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Generative KI-Systeme sind als Hilfsmittel grundsätzlich zulässig. Deren Nutzung ist an den erstellten Produkten aber nicht nachweisbar und birgt potentiell die Möglichkeit zur Täuschung in unbeaufsichtigten schriftlichen Studien- und Prüfungsleistungen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Senate recommendations state that generative AI systems are generally permissible as aids, while noting integrity risks in unsupervised written study and exam work.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Empfehlungen zum Umgang mit generativen KI-Systemen im Zusammenhang mit akademischen Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Studierende reichen mit ihren schriftlichen Arbeiten zusätzlich zur Eigenständigkeitserklärung eine Erklärung zur Verwendung generativer KI ein. Was genau in dieser Erklärung enthalten sein muss, bestimmen Prüferin oder Prüfer.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Students submit an AI-use declaration with written work in addition to the declaration of originality; the examiner determines its required content.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Erklärung zur Verwendung von generativer KI
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Empfehlungen zum Umgang mit generativen KI-Systemen im Zusammenhang mit akademischen Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Wenn Hilfsmittel wie generative KI-Systeme benutzt werden dürfen, ist neben einer Eigenständigkeitserklärung eine Übersicht über die benutzten KI-Systeme und deren Verwendung als Anlage zur schriftlichen Arbeit beizufügen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: If tools such as generative AI systems may be used, an overview of the AI systems used and how they were used must be attached to the written work alongside the originality declaration.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Empfehlungen zum Umgang mit generativen KI-Systemen im Zusammenhang mit akademischen Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Unbedingt müssen Sie aber beachten: Daten von Dritten dürfen Sie ohne deren Zustimmung nicht weitergeben! Das gilt auch für die Eingabe in KI-Systeme, denn auf diese Daten können Beschäftigte des Anbieters Zugriff haben und sie können auch zum weiteren Training der Systeme benutzt werden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Third-party data may not be passed on without consent, including by entering it into AI systems; provider employees may access it and it may be used for training.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: FAQ für Studierende, Datenschutz und Urheberrecht
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von generativer KI in Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Empfehlungen zum Umgang mit generativen KI-Systemen im Zusammenhang mit akademischen Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Studierende dürfen keine Texte oder Daten, für die sie keine Urheberrechte oder das explizite Nutzungsrecht für diesen Verwendungszweck haben, Dritten zur Verfügung stellen. Dies schließt ein Einspeisen von Texten oder Daten in generative KI-Systeme ein.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Students may not make texts or data available to third parties without the required copyright or explicit usage rights; this includes feeding texts or data into generative AI systems.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Empfehlungen zum Umgang mit generativen KI-Systemen im Zusammenhang mit akademischen Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: GPTalk
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: GPTalk bietet allen Universitätsangehörigen einen niederschwelligen, datenschutzgerechten Zugang zu modernen Sprachmodellen wie ChatGPT von OpenAI sowie zu leistungsfähigen Open-Source-KIs – bequem im Browser, ohne externes Konto und ohne Weitergabe personenbezogener Daten.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: GPTalk gives university members browser-based, privacy-conscious access to modern language models including OpenAI ChatGPT and open-source AI, without an external account or sharing personal data.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.publisher: Kommunikations-, Informations- und Medienzentrum (KIM), Universität Hohenheim
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Leitfaden zum Umgang mit GPTalk
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Für Studierende: Nutzen Sie GPTalk zur Unterstützung Ihres Lernprozesses, aber nicht als ausschließliche Quelle. Geben Sie keine personenbezogenen Daten ein – auch nicht von anderen Personen. Sie tragen die Verantwortung für die Inhalte und gelten als Autor*in der Arbeit. Machen Sie den Einsatz von KI transparent.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For students, GPTalk should support learning but not serve as the sole source; students should enter no personal data, remain responsible as authors, and make AI use transparent.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.publisher: Kommunikations-, Informations- und Medienzentrum (KIM), Universität Hohenheim
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Leitfaden zum Umgang mit GPTalk
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Für Lehrende: GPTalk darf nicht zur Korrektur oder Bewertung studentischer Arbeiten verwendet werden. Auch bei anonymisierten Arbeiten ist zu beachten, dass der Einsatz generativer KI in Bewertungsprozessen gemäß EU-KI-Verordnung als Hochrisikoanwendung gelten kann.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For lecturers, GPTalk may not be used to correct or assess student work; even with anonymized work, generative AI in assessment processes can be high-risk under the EU AI Act.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.publisher: Kommunikations-, Informations- und Medienzentrum (KIM), Universität Hohenheim
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

Approved as a narrow declaration/transparency claim; avoids asserting requirements beyond the official evidence.
Approved as a privacy/data-handling claim supported by official guidance and Senate recommendations.
Approved as an official-tool/service description from KIM, not as a general mandate to use GPTalk.
Approved as a GPTalk-specific use-rules claim based on the KIM guide PDF; not generalized to all AI tools.

artifacts.title: University of Hohenheim Generative AI Guidance and GPTalk Source Notes
artifacts.summary: University of Hohenheim official sources describe Senate recommendations for generative AI in unsupervised written exams, AI-use declaration expectations, data-protection and copyright cautions, and GPTalk as a university-internal AI chat service with specific usage rules. Claims are staged as agent-reviewed candidates only and are not marked canonical.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
German official sources are canonical for the staged evidence; English display snippets are helper translations only.
News and resource-index pages were used for discovery context but rejected as direct policy evidence.
Firecrawl extraction was throttled by concurrency on some requests but returned successful source content; static HTTP HEAD checks also returned 200 for the key official URLs.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
